parameters.query: SELECT * FROM utilisateurs WHERE token_session = '{{ $('Parse Parameters').first().json.token }}' AND actif = true AND token_expiration > NOW()

parameters.query: SELECT f.*, c.nom as client_nom, c.ville as client_ville FROM factures f LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = f.client_id ORDER BY f.date_facture DESC
SELECT * FROM clients ORDER BY nom
